sections.paragraph:
(“whom Jehovah caused to rise,” see זָרַח No. 2, ), [Zerahiah], pr.n. m.-

(1) 1 Chr. 5:32 6:36 Ezr 7:4, for which יִזְרַחְיָה occurs, 1Ch 7:3.-(2) Ezr 8:4.

[“זָרִים i.q. זֶרֶם (see Thes.) a violent shower, inundation, bursting of a cloud. Isa 1:7, כְּמַהְפֵּכַת זָרִים “as the desolation of an inundation,” or overwhelming rain. See in partic. כְּ.-Root זָרַם.”]
